subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the love of God! The wine of mortality and the delightsome drink have but a momentary exhilaration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده محبت الله باده خلار و می خوشگوار را نشئه دمیست و دریای پرخوشش
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
